hunter_likelihood_reason: Exclusion: handles only tourism bus guide (観光バスガイド) placement; a niche service-occupation placement, not headhunting.
notes: No website, email, or contact form found. Business サンライズ観光バスガイド紹介所 is a sole proprietorship specializing exclusively in bus guide placement (MHLW license 04-ユ-080002). MHLW page confirms exact company by name, business name, phone, and license number. Google searches return only directory listings (Mapion, Townpage, NAVITIME, Yahoo Maps); no official company site or contact form exists.
